title: Cryptozoologicraft | A Minecraft Cryptid Mod
description: Adds Cryptids to your Minecraft World
body:
**_GECKOLIB REQUIRED!_**

This Mod adds different kinds of Cryptids and Legendary Creatures that will spawn in your Minecraft World!

This mod is Work in Progress I guess

 

List of Cryptids:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

-Sasquatch

-Loch Ness Monster

-Chupacabra

-Mothman

-Nightcrawler

-Yeti

-Flatwoods Monster

-Bunyip

-Jersey Devil

-Frogman

-Mapinguari

-Ningen

-Kappa

-Jackalope

-Mokele-Mbembe

-Hoop Snake

-Tripodero

-Grafton Monster

-Goatman

-Ropen

-Mermaid


</details>


 

 

 

Upcoming Features:

-More Cryptids

-Tameable Cryptids

-Bartering with Frogmen and Kappas

-More Fixes
